ItacAcademyItem.Name: Floridi (Accademia dei)
ItacAcademyItem.Notes: The name of this academy is mentioned in the Atti della R. Accademia Virgiliana di Mantova (Mantua, 1886). According to Maylender, the academy existed in the 17th century (Maylender 1926-30, III, p. 33).
ItacAcademyItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
